title: Briful 10PCS Gypsophila Artificial Flowers 23.6" Artificial Babys Breath Flowers, Green Artificial Flowers Faux Gypsophila for DIY Arrangement Fake Babys Breath for Home Garden Wedding Decor
features: STUNNING LOOKING: Incorporate delicate autumn accenting into your decor scheme this season with this loose set of artificial gypsophila branches. Better known as baby’s breath, these dainty flowers are fixed to 10 long slender stems that can easily be mixed with a variety ofther flowers or elegantly displayed on their own.

DIY FLOWER ARRANGEMENTS: Easily incorporated into your own personalized bouquets or DIY projects, these decorative flowers stems make for a perfect accent all season long. They’re also a great addition to bridal and banquet arrangements.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: These artificial gypsophila sprays are manufactured using synthetic materials, such as polyester material or plastic and are well designed and constructed to be life-like in appearance.
SIZE&PACKAGE: Arriving in a package of 10, each individual stem reaches 23.6" (60cm) long and showcases intricate gypsophila flowers in a fiery palette of autumn inspired hues.

TIPS: This item will need to be re-shaped when removed from the PE bag to allow it to reach its fullest size. Your artificial plants will look beautiful for years to come, simply wipe clean with a soft dry cloth when needed.
description: Product description Fake Flowers Gypsophila Branches Product dimensions: Height: 23.6-inch / 60cm. Adds a breath of freshness wherever displayed Great as a standalone or mixed with other floral arrangements Recommended for indoor use or a covered, protected outdoor location. Package: 10 pcs Artificial Gypsophila Baby's Breath Easy to DIY: Each flower head and branch can be uninstalled and install. Great for wreath-make, Hair ornament, green leaves, home decoration, chair decoration, table decoration and so on. Safety Warning Caution: This artificial plant contains materials that may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions in some people. Please handle with care and keep away from children and pets.
